feedback: Extraordinary. Lock as visual direction. A was also liked; C didn't work.
direction: Editorial, typography-forward. Cream #F5EFE7 app bg, warm rust/terracotta accent (~#C96E4E), display serif masthead (condensed, bold), Inter for chrome, sidebar with left-accent-bar active state, facing-page thumbnail grid as main canvas, outlined buttons with accent color, generous whitespace, zero AI-slop patterns.
